monologue: Okay, so before I see anything I have to log in. At least they put demo credentials right there — admin/admin123, fine. Let me use that.

friction.title: Login wall before any content
friction.expectationViolated: I expected to see at least a preview or something before being forced to authenticate

monologue: Username typed, now the password field.

Okay, I'm in. Dashboard shows 101 active orders but I don't see an "Orders" button in the sidebar — just Dashboard, Kanban, Audit, Anagrafiche, Impostazioni. Where's the order list? I'd try "Kanban" — that sounds like it shows work items.

friction.title: No "Ordini" entry in sidebar nav
friction.expectationViolated: Expected a direct 'Orders' link in the menu; instead I see Dashboard and Kanban and have to guess which one has the list

monologue: Okay, there's the order list — Kanban view with columns like "IN CORSO", "IN LAVORAZIONE" etc. I can see individual order cards. I'll click the first one, "23/26 LE VERNE S.r.l.", to open it.
actionLabel: clicks "23/26 LE VERNE S.r.l. N°1 SOLLEVAMENTO (VUC) NO —"

monologue: Oh wow, the order detail pops right open with a "CAMBIO STATO RAPIDO" section at the bottom — dropdown plus a button. That's exactly what I need. Much easier than I expected. Let me click that dropdown.
The dropdown shows only two options: "DISEGNO IN GESTIONE" and "SOSPESO". Hm, I expected to see all states — why can I only pick two? Anyway, I'll pick "DISEGNO IN GESTIONE" and see what happens.

friction.title: Only 2 states visible in dropdown, no explanation why
friction.expectationViolated: Expected to see all possible statuses; the filtered list gives no hint that transitions are constrained by workflow rules

monologue: The dropdown reset to "Seleziona stato" — my click selected nothing. Let me try again: I'll click to open it and use the keyboard to pick "DISEGNO IN GESTIONE".
Dropdown is open again — I'll press ArrowDown to highlight "DISEGNO IN GESTIONE" and Enter to confirm.
"DISEGNO IN GESTIONE" is highlighted. Pressing Enter to select it.
Selected "DISEGNO IN GESTIONE" and now the "Aggiorna stato" button turned solid blue — it's active. Clicking it.

The badge at the top changed from "IN CORSO" to "DISEGNO IN GESTIONE" — it worked! But I don't see any toast or success message. Did it actually save? The badge changed so I think yes, but I'm not 100% sure without a clear confirmation.

friction.title: No success toast after status update
friction.expectationViolated: Expected a visible confirmation (toast/snackbar) that the change was saved; only the badge updated silently — a distracted user could miss it and wonder if it worked

action.reason: Status updated from IN CORSO to DISEGNO IN GESTIONE; badge confirms change. All 5 milestones completed.
